raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified multiple conceptual issues and proposed a tighter framing, partially supported by evidence.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure and provided clear evidence to support its claims.",
    "R1.4": "The agent mapped the work against the nearest 3-5 works and identified sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified multiple conceptual issues and proposed a tighter framing, partially supported by evidence.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure and provided clear evidence to support its claims.
rationale.R1.4: The agent mapped the work against the nearest 3-5 works and identified sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
